subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who is the founder of Jodhpur State?
question_hi: जोधपुर राज्य की संतुष कौन है।
explanation_en: Rao Jodha is the founder of Jodhpur State. He founded the Meeragarh Fort and established the Rathore dynasty in the 15th century.
